name: OODS Foundry — Cursor stdio MCP
summary: Connect Cursor to the OODS MCP adapter via stdio transport. No HTTP bridge required.
notes: Cursor reads MCP server config from .cursor/mcp.json in the project root.
The adapter spawns the native MCP server as a child process — build it first.
Default mode exposes 11 auto tools. Set MCP_TOOLSET=all for all 20 tools.
No HTTP bridge needed: Cursor communicates directly via stdin/stdout.
